title: Red-Pill Framework Patterns Configuration
description: Schema for the versioned framework auto-escape, detection, and pattern configuration used by red_pill_mapper.py.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this config file's structure. The mapper rejects versions it does not recognise.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this config was exported.

generated_by.description: Command that produced this config file.

frameworks.description: Per-framework auto-escape behaviour and detection signals.

last_reviewed_version.description: Last framework version the operator reviewed for security-relevant changes. Compared against the drift-check milestone knowledge base.

default_safe_contexts.description: Render contexts (e.g. html_body, html_attribute, js_body, url) in which this framework auto-escapes by default.

bypass_markers.description: Substrings / regex fragments that indicate auto-escape is being bypassed (e.g. dangerouslySetInnerHTML, |safe, v-html).

context_notes.description: Human-readable explanation of the framework's auto-escape model.

signals.description: Regex fragments used to detect this framework in source code.

default_escape_contexts.description: Escape contexts the framework protects by default (used for confidence scoring).

trusted_bypass_apis.description: Named APIs / syntax that bypass the framework's auto-escape (informational — detection uses signals).

framework_specific_patterns.description: Source, sink, and dangerous-transform patterns that are framework-specific (as opposed to language-generic patterns hardcoded in the mapper).

regex.description: Regex pattern (uncompiled — the mapper compiles it at load time).

source_kind.description: For source patterns: the kind of input source (body, url_route_param, etc.).

sink_kind.description: For sink patterns: the kind of sink (client_framework, server_template, etc.).

render_context.description: For sink patterns: the DOM / template context where content is rendered.

execution_context.description: For sink patterns: where the injected content executes (user_browser usually).

dangerous_kind.description: For dangerous patterns: the kind of dangerous transform (trust_marking, etc.).

frameworks.description: Framework keys this pattern applies to.

_template_render_patterns.description: Regex patterns for extracting template variable mappings from render calls.

regex.description: Regex with capture groups: group-1 = template name, group-2 = context expression.

_route_patterns.description: Regex patterns for extracting route definitions from framework routing files.

regex.description: Regex with capture group-1 = route path.
